Name: DashboardManager Page
Description: Top-menu entry DashboardManager opens this page component.

Name: Top Navigation Hook
Description: selectedMenu === 'DashboardManager' renders <DashboardManager />.

Name: DashboardManager (Main Container)
Description: Main orchestration component: tabs

Name: Header Actions Bar
Description: Buttons: Create Dashboard, Drag Mode, tab switches, Refresh.

Name: Dashboards Tab
Description: Shows dashboard cards and selected dashboard visual area.

Name: Widgets Tab
Description: Tabular widget management (edit/delete/add/refresh).

Name: Data Sources Tab
Description: Tabular data source management.

Name: Create Context Menu Tab
Description: Loads separate context-menu management component.

Name: Assign Filters Tab
Description: Loads separate filter-assignment component and assignment grid.

Name: DashboardCard
Description: Individual dashboard tile with select/edit/delete/drop handling.

Name: Selected Dashboard Panel
Description: Displays selected dashboard info and widget grid container.

Name: GridLayout (Widget Canvas)
Description: Responsive drag/resize layout for widgets.

Name: WidgetComponent
Description: Per-widget renderer with data + type-based UI rendering.

Name: KPIView
Description: KPI value/trend visual display.

Name: Chart Renderer Block
Description: Renders chart-like visuals from normalized data.

Name: Table Renderer Block
Description: Renders normalized table rows/columns.

Name: Text Renderer Block
Description: Renders textual widget content.

Name: Map Renderer Block
Description: MAP type logic with dynamic leaflet component loading.

Name: RecursiveMenu
Description: Nested context-menu rendering tree.

Name: DashboardModal
Description: Create/Edit dashboard modal.

Name: WidgetModal
Description: Create/Edit widget modal + preview + config fields.

Name: DataSourceModal
Description: Create/Edit datasource modal with JSON config fields.

Name: ContextMenuTab (Separate Component)
Description: Full CRUD for context menus and widget-context assignments.

Name: AssignFiltersTab (Separate Component)
Description: Assign filters at dashboard/widget scope.

Name: MapWidget (Separate Component dynamic)
Description: Dynamically imported map widget for MAP visual type.
